summary: QA PASS with finding: Log command correctly wires all filter flags (--agent, --outcome, --since, --until, --limit, --offset) with AND semantics. --json outputs JSON to stdout. Empty results set process.exitCode=1. Build and lint pass. FINDING: CLI package has no test infrastructure — the log command delegates to LogReader (tested in runtime-host with LOGR-U1-U6) but cannot be unit tested without a Commander test harness. This is an honest gap, not a blocker for v0.1.

verification.notes: All verification passed. build, lint, tests — all green.
